| --- | --- | --- |
| ℕ | 1, 2, 3… | Counting |
| ℤ | …−1, 0, 1… | Difference |
| ℚ | p/q | Ratio |
| ℝ | π, √2 | Continuous measure |
| ℂ | a+bi | Engineering, quantum |
